case_title: PRAVEEN REDDY BANURI VS. IK SOLUTIONS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANURI, PRAVEEN REDDY AS TO DEFENDANT IK SOLUTIONS, INC. A FLORIDA CORPORATION INDUKURI, DEVI JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
